mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tx_step (tx_id, step_index, step_name, action_method, action_url, action_body, compensate_method, compensate_url, compensate_body, status, retry_count, retry_max, timeout_ms, last_error) VALUES
(#{it.txId}, #{it.stepIndex}, #{it.stepName}, #{it.actionMethod}, #{it.actionUrl}, #{it.actionBody}, #{it.compensateMethod}, #{it.compensateUrl}, #{it.compensateBody}, #{it.status}, #{it.retryCount}, #{it.retryMax}, #{it.timeoutMs}, #{it.lastError})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tx_step WHERE tx_id = #{txId} ORDER BY step_index ASC
SELECT * FROM tx_step WHERE tx_id = #{txId} AND step_index = #{stepIndex}
